creator: null@null.FreeBSD.org
text:
On the Gnapster web page it says:
--------------------------------
Gnapster 1.4.0:

         Optional GNOME dependency now
--------------------------------
In the Gnapster Makefile it has USE_GNOME  = yes, I figured you could
make it with USE_GNOME = NO and that would allow for the optional gnome
dependency?  Maybe I am doing something wrong, but I thought I would
post a PR to let someone know.
